meta.description: AI tool to search knowledge graph for entity relationships and semantic connections
meta.usage: Connect to AI Agent - enables graph-based reasoning over market data
meta.source: Adapted from Cole Medin RAG Template V5 - MCP Client Tool

parameters.toolDescription:
Use this tool to search the knowledge graph for entity relationships, similar businesses, or cross-source connections.

**When to use this tool:**
- Finding relationships between entities ("businesses similar to ABC Cooling")
- Entity resolution ("Is ABC Cooling the same as ABC Cooling & Heating Inc?")
- Multi-source queries ("businesses mentioned in both permit data and Apify")
- Semantic search ("HVAC contractors with high permit activity")

**Data sources in graph:**
- Businesses from Apify (name, location, category, rating)
- Reviews with sentiment (positive/negative themes)
- External data when added (PDFs, URLs, Docs)

**Example questions:**
- "What businesses are similar to XYZ Company?"
- "Find HVAC contractors in Southwest cities with growing permit trends"
- "Which businesses have both high ratings and negative parking complaints?"
- "Show me entities mentioned in Phoenix permit data that match Apify businesses"

**How it works:**
The graph connects businesses by location, category, and sentiment themes. It automatically resolves entity variations ("ABC Cooling" vs "ABC Cooling & Heating").

This tool complements SQL tools:
- Use SQL for exact filters (city='Phoenix', rating>4.5)
- Use graph for relationships and similarities

notes.what_ai_sends: Natural language query like 'find businesses similar to ABC Cooling'
notes.what_graphiti_returns: Entity nodes and relationships in graph format
notes.how_ai_uses_it: AI converts graph results into natural language answer for user
